title: calycera crassifolia var. spinuligera
intro: Calycera crassifolia var. spinuligera, also known as the spiny calycera, is a plant species in the family Calyceraceae, characterized by its spiny stems and yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Calycera crassifolia var. spinuligera has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and gastritis, as well as to alleviate pain and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic benefits.
